title: zollikoferia pumila
intro: Zollikoferia pumila, a flowering plant native to South America, is a member of the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Zollikoferia pumila include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in the management of conditions such as diarrhea, fever, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Zollikoferia pumila often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
